title: Gazette Notification (GEF)
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 772 ] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 28, 2002/BHADRA 6,1924 MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th August, 2002 S.O. 918(E).—In pursuance of Section 3 of the United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 (46 of 1947), the Central Government hereby declares that the provisions of Article II (Section 7 only) of the Schedule to the said Act shall apply mutatis mutandis to the Global Environment Facility (GEF) and to its representatives and officers subject to the following modifications, namely:— In the Schedule of the said Act, for the words "The United Nations" wherever they occur in section 7 of Article II the words "Global Environment Facility" shall be substituted. [F. No. UI/451/05/2000] DEEPA GOPALAN WADHWA, Jt. Secy. (UNES) 2706 GI 2002 Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India . Press, Ring Road Mayapuri. NEW Delhi-110064 and published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
